Whether the board has no empty cells

Source: R/tsr_status.R
tsr_is_full.Rd

Whether the board has no empty cells

Usage

tsr_is_full(board)

Arguments

board

A ttt_board.

Value

Logical scalar.

Examples

tsr_is_full(tsr_new_board())
#> [1] FALSE
